sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Mkdwell Tech issues 709,740 ordinary shares under 2026 equity plan By Investing.com
feed.summary: Mkdwell Tech Inc. (NASDAQ: MKDW, MKDWW) has issued 709,740 new ordinary shares to four individuals under its 2026 Equity Incentive Plan. These shares and the plan were registered with the SEC on March 31, 2026. Following this issuance, Mkdwell Tech now has 4,258,442 ordinary shares and 274,366 class A preferred shares outstanding, with each preferred share carrying 100 votes.

feed.title: ONEMAIN INVESTOR ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C., a stockholder rights law firm, is investigating potential claims against OneMain Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:OMF) after a lawsuit was filed against the company by the New York Attorney General and 12 other state attorneys general. The lawsuit alleges that OneMain misled customers and trapped borrowers in expensive loans with hidden costs, which caused OneMain's stock price to fall by 5.38% on March 16, 2026. The firm encourages investors who suffered losses to contact them to discuss their legal options.

feed.title: Major UNIFIRST (UNF) holder makes pre-planned gifts of 1,500 shares
feed.summary: Cecelia Levenstein, a major UNIFIRST (UNF) holder, reported making six pre-planned bona fide gifts of 250 shares each, totaling 1,500 shares of common stock, to a charitable organization. These transactions occurred between February 6 and March 17, 2026. After these gifts, she directly owned 4,023 shares, and the late reporting of these transactions was attributed to an administrative oversight.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma CEO Laura Alber sells $3m in stock
feed.summary: Laura Alber, CEO of Williams-Sonoma (WSM), recently sold 15,000 shares of company stock for $3 million, a transaction executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Alber still holds over 958,000 direct shares and 33,000 indirect shares. The company has also seen positive analyst ratings, strategic initiatives, and promotions within its brands, reflecting confidence in its market position.

feed.title: TE Connectivity PLC (TEL) Shares Fall 9.1% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: TE Connectivity PLC (TEL) shares dropped 9.1% to $221.04, placing its current price 23.0% above its GF Value™ of $179.75, indicating overvaluation. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 88/100, significant insider selling of $9.6 million over the last three months raises concerns about the stock's future performance and suggests a lack of confidence among company executives. The stock's P/E (TTM) of 22.6x is also 14% above its 5-year median, reinforcing the overvaluation assessment.

feed.title: Best Buy Co Inc (BBY) Shares Fall 4.6% -- What GF Score of 76 Te
feed.summary: Best Buy Co Inc (BBY) shares dropped 4.6% to $63.53, trading below its GF Value™ of $75.42, indicating it is 15.8% undervalued. The company holds a GF Score™ of 76/100, reflecting strong financial health and profitability but weak growth prospects. Insiders have recently sold $4.9 million in shares, with no corresponding buying activity.

feed.title: McEwen Inc (MUX) Shares Surge 3.8% -- What GF Score of 67 Tells Investors
feed.summary: McEwen Inc (MUX) shares surged 3.8% to $24.72, significantly above its GF Value™ estimate of $9.92, indicating it is overvalued. The company holds a GF Score™ of 67/100, with strong growth potential but concerns regarding valuation and profitability. No insider transactions have been reported in the last three months, suggesting caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Expedia Group Inc (EXPE) Shares Fall 3.4% -- What GF Score of 84 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Expedia Group Inc. (EXPE) shares fell 3.4% to $264.60, making it significantly overvalued by 42.4% according to GuruFocus's GF Value™. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 84, driven by high Profitability, Growth, and Momentum, the stock's valuation is poor, and insiders have sold $1.8 million worth of shares with no buying activity, suggesting a lack of confidence in its near-term prospects. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to the overvaluation and insider selling.

feed.title: Is Costco's Stock Too Expensive Now?
feed.summary: Costco's stock is trading near $1,000 per share, which might seem expensive, but its valuation is justified by its strong business model and financials. The company boasts high membership renewal rates and consistently improves its net sales and income, recently increasing its quarterly dividend. Despite a forward P/E ratio of nearly 50, Costco's ability to offer lower prices than competitors due to its scale solidifies its competitive advantage.

feed.title: Citi Announces Offers to Purchase Three Series of Outstanding Citigroup Inc. Notes
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Inc. (CGMI) has announced cash offers to purchase three series of its outstanding notes, totaling approximately $4.75 billion, with a "waterfall" methodology and a cap of $1.25 billion on the aggregate consideration paid. The offers include an early tender premium and have an early tender date of May 5, 2026, and an expiration date of May 20, 2026. The intention is to manage its liability and certain conditions must be met for the tenders to be accepted.

feed.title: Trimble investors get first-quarter results webcast May 6 at 8 a.m. ET
feed.summary: Trimble (Nasdaq: TRMB) will host its first-quarter 2026 earnings call and webcast on May 6, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss the company's financial results. Analysts can register for dial-in access, while a live webcast will be available for all investors. This announcement is considered neutral for the stock, though past strategic and funding events have generally led to positive reactions.

feed.title: Hershey Co (HSY) trust sells 30,000 common shares while retaining large stake
feed.summary: The Hershey Trust Company, acting as trustee for the Milton Hershey School Trust, sold 30,000 shares of The Hershey Company common stock through open-market transactions between April 20-22, 2026. The sales were executed at weighted average prices ranging from $187.9787 to $195.1580 per share. Despite these sales, the trust retains a significant stake, including over 1.7 million direct common shares and 54.6 million Class B common shares convertible into common stock.

feed.title: Rapport Therapeutics CDO Yeleswaram Krishnaswamy sells $808,844 stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Rapport Therapeutics' Chief Development Officer, Yeleswaram Krishnaswamy, sold 20,225 shares of the company's common stock for over $808,000 on April 17, 2026, through a pre-arranged trading plan. Despite the sale, the company's stock has seen a significant annual increase, though it is currently considered overvalued according to InvestingPro. Meanwhile, Rapport Therapeutics recently announced positive Phase 2a trial results for its epilepsy drug RAP-219, leading to accelerated Phase 3 trials and reiterated "Buy" ratings from several analysts.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Issues New Series L Preferred Stock
feed.summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) has established a new Series L Preferred Stock, detailing its dividend, voting, redemption, and liquidation rights. The company also entered an underwriting agreement to sell 1.5 million depositary shares, each representing a 1/100th interest in a Series L Preferred Stock share, to raise capital and strengthen its balance sheet. Analysts have given SCHW a Buy rating with a $110.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform due to strong financial performance and positive operational metrics.

feed.title: NIO (NYSE:NIO) Trading Up 1% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Shares of NIO (NYSE:NIO) increased by approximately 1% on Wednesday, with the stock trading up to $6.61 on reduced volume. Recent analyst upgrades from Nomura, HSBC, and DBS suggest positive sentiment, although the MarketBeat consensus remains a "Hold" with a $6.80 price target. The company faces a negative P/E and net margin, with institutional investors holding a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: Simplify Hedged Equity ETF Offers Protection Against Volatile Markets
feed.summary: The Simplify Hedged Equity ETF (HEQT) aims to protect investors during volatile markets by maintaining exposure to the S&P 500 while employing a put spread collar options strategy. This strategy involves purchasing and selling put options along with a covered call to buffer against losses, although it caps potential gains and may come with higher management fees. The fund manages timing risk by layering these collars across different monthly expiration dates, offering a tactical option for risk management rather than maximizing total returns.

feed.title: Is Globe Life (GL) Overvalued After Q1 2026? GAAP EPS $3.39, Premium Revenue $1.27B -- GF Score 89/100, 3.1% Overvalued
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (GL) released its Q1 2026 earnings, reporting GAAP diluted EPS of $3.39 and total insurance premium revenue of $1.27 billion, with premiums up 6% year over year. Despite strong operational performance, including a 19% rise in book value per share and significant share repurchases, GuruFocus rates GL as 3.1% overvalued with a GF Score of 89/100. The company showed robust growth in both life and health insurance segments, though insider selling activity and a slight increase in administrative expenses are noted watch points.

feed.title: NeurAxis Expands At-The-Market Equity Offering Capacity
feed.summary: NeurAxis, Inc. (NRXS) has expanded its at-the-market (ATM) equity offering capacity to $11.5 million from the previous $6.27 million. This move allows the company to sell more common stock to raise additional equity capital. A recent analyst rating on NRXS stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target.

feed.title: Southwest Air drops as US airlines contend with soaring fuel
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. reported adjusted quarterly profit and revenue below Wall Street expectations due to rising fuel costs, a challenge faced by other US carriers. The airline declined to update its full-year profit guidance, emphasizing the need for lower fuel prices and stronger revenue. Southwest's stock fell 3.8% and closed at $39.35, and it forecasts second-quarter adjusted EPS of 35 to 65 cents, below analyst estimates.

feed.title: Casino operator Las Vegas Sands quarterly profit rises on Macau, Singapore demand
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands reported a higher first-quarter profit, driven by strong demand in its Macau and Singapore businesses. The casino operator's shares rose over 2% after the announcement. Revenue from Singapore operations increased 27.9% to $1.49 billion, and Macau operations saw a 23.7% rise to $2.11 billion, leading to a quarterly adjusted profit of 91 cents per share, exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: Latest MPV News - Barings Participation Investors Reports Prel...
feed.summary: This page aggregates news and insights for MassMutual Participation Investors (MPV), a closed-end management investment company advised by Barings LLC. It details quarterly financial results, net investment income, NAV changes, and dividend declarations, including a special dividend in Q4 2024. The Trust focuses on 1st lien senior secured middle-market investments and public fixed income, with regular updates on new investments, add-ons, and realizations.

feed.title: Crown Castle Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Crown Castle reported solid Q1 2026 results and affirmed its full-year guidance as it transitions to a standalone tower business, with the sale of small cell and fiber divisions expected by mid-2026. The company is actively pursuing legal action against Dish Network for breach of contract and focusing on operational efficiency improvements and strategic investments in land acquisition and systems. Crown Castle anticipates future growth from mobile data demand, upcoming spectrum deployments, and potential new tower builds, maintaining its dividend and investment-grade rating.

feed.title: NRX Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Common Stock (NRXP) Stock Price Today & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of NRX Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NRXP) common stock, including its stock price, fundamental financials, and corporate actions. It also offers a FAQ section on how to buy NRXP stock through the Gotrade app, minimum investment, dividend policy, safety, market hours, and how to assess its valuation. NRX Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage company focusing on central nervous system disorders and life-threatening pulmonary diseases.

feed.title: Nexalin Advances Pivotal Insomnia Trial for HALO Clarity
feed.summary: Nexalin Technology has initiated a pivotal clinical trial for its HALO Clarity device to treat insomnia, collaborating with Lindus Health for trial execution. The 160-patient, triple-blinded study aims for enrollment in Q2 2026 to support a De Novo submission to the FDA, potentially establishing a new product category for its neurostimulator and enhancing Nexalin's position in the sleep tech and mental health markets. The company sees significant potential in the underserved insomnia market for its non-pharmacologic solution.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Crown Castle’s Q1 2026 earnings miss but future guidance steady
feed.summary: Crown Castle reported Q1 2026 earnings per share of $0.34 and revenue of $961 million, missing analyst expectations. Despite the financial misses, the company's stock rose modestly in aftermarket trading due to the reaffirmation of full-year guidance and ongoing strategic restructuring efforts to focus on its U.S. tower operations. The company is also actively pursuing legal action against DISH for contract breaches and expects to complete the sale of its small cell and fiber businesses in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: KKR Real Estate: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF) reported a loss of $56.1 million in its first quarter, translating to a loss of 96 cents per share. After adjusting for non-recurring costs and stock option expenses, the loss was 6 cents per share. The company generated $95.9 million in revenue, with an adjusted revenue of $26.2 million for the period.

feed.title: NewMarket Corp (NEU) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings: Revenue and EPS Down, Cash from Ops Up
feed.summary: NewMarket Corp (NEU) reported Q1 2026 earnings with revenue and diluted EPS both decreasing year-over-year to $669.7 million and $12.62, respectively. Despite these declines, cash from operating activities showed a significant increase of 20.66% to $145.2 million. Insider trading activity included one purchase by TING XU, and institutional investors showed mixed sentiment with 178 adding and 210 decreasing their positions in NEU stock.

feed.title: Honeywell plans to expand aircraft engine manufacturing in Phoenix for proposed US Navy jet trainer
feed.summary: Honeywell Aerospace announced its intention to expand F124 jet engine manufacturing at its Phoenix Engines campus by incorporating on-site assembly. This expansion is contingent on a corporate partner winning a US Navy trainer jet contract in 2027, potentially leading to the production of over 400 engines within 13 years.

feed.title: Mkdwell Tech issues 709,740 ordinary shares under 2026 equity plan
feed.summary: Mkdwell Tech Inc. has announced the issuance of 709,740 new ordinary shares to four individuals under its 2026 Equity Incentive Plan. These shares were registered with the SEC on March 31, 2026. Following this issuance, the company now has 4,258,442 ordinary shares and 274,366 class A preferred shares outstanding, with each preferred share carrying 100 votes.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) Q1 2026 earnings results beat EPS and revenue expectations
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) announced its Q1 2026 earnings, surpassing both revenue and EPS expectations. The semiconductor manufacturer reported $4.52 billion in revenue against an expectation of $4.825 billion, and $1.68 EPS versus an anticipated $1.40. Following the announcement, TXN's stock saw a significant jump in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Molina Healthcare beats quarterly profit estimates on controlled medical costs
feed.summary: Molina Healthcare surpassed Wall Street's first-quarter profit estimates due to effectively managed medical costs and increased enrollment in government-backed health plans. The company also reaffirmed its 2026 outlook for total premium revenue and adjusted earnings, despite plans to exit Medicare Advantage prescription drug plans by 2027.

feed.title: ServiceNow, Inc. 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:NOW)
feed.summary: ServiceNow, Inc. published its Q1 2026 earnings call presentation. This article provides access to the slide deck presented during the earnings call, allowing investors and interested parties to review the company's financial results and strategic updates. The content specifically mentions the company's NYSE ticker NOW and the Canadian stock symbol NOWS:CA.

feed.title: First biologic for kids as young as 2 wins U.S. approval for chronic hives
feed.summary: Regeneron and Sanofi have secured FDA approval for Dupixent (dupilumab) to treat chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) in children aged 2-11 who remain symptomatic despite antihistamines. This marks Dupixent as the first biologic for this age group and expands its indications to nine allergy-related conditions. The approval is based on clinical trial data showing Dupixent significantly reduced itch and urticaria activity, with a safety profile consistent with previous dermatological uses.

feed.title: Air Force Adds $207.9M to Northrop Grumman Contract for Global Logistics Support
feed.summary: The Air Force has awarded Northrop Grumman Systems Corp. a $207.9 million modification to an existing contract for an additional year of global contractor logistics support services, increasing the total contract value to $596 million. This modification involves Foreign Military Sales to the Republic of Korea, Japan, and NATO. The article also details several other significant defense contracts awarded to various companies across the Navy, Defense Logistics Agency, Air Force, and Army.

feed.title: Pfizer Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.43 a Share, Payable June 12 to Shareholders of Record May 8
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.43 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 12 to shareholders of record as of May 8.

feed.title: KKR Invests $1.5B in Vertical Bridge for Growth
feed.summary: KKR has made a substantial $1.5 billion equity investment in Vertical Bridge on April 22, 2026, aiming to bolster the telecommunications infrastructure company's growth and establish a long-term capital framework. This strategic move positions KKR, a leading alternative asset manager, in the expanding telecommunications sector, supporting Vertical Bridge's operations and 5G expansion. While KKR demonstrates strong profitability, investors are advised to consider its lower financial strength rating and elevated P/E ratio.

feed.title: Seattle could lose hundreds of millions in tax revenue as Starbucks expands in Tennessee
feed.summary: Seattle faces a potential loss of up to $750 million in tax revenue as Starbucks announced a $100 million investment and 2,000 new jobs in Nashville, Tennessee. This move comes as Seattle's Tax Foundation ranking for doing business has plummeted and the state recently implemented a "millionaires tax," contrasting sharply with Tennessee Governor Bill Lee's welcoming stance. Seattle Mayor Katie Wilson's past encouragement to boycott Starbucks also highlights the differing business climates between the two states.

feed.title: OGIG Surges 8.4% on Oracle, DoorDash Gains
feed.summary: The ALPS O’Shares Global Internet Giants ETF (OGIG) experienced an 8.4% surge last week, driven by significant gains in Oracle and DoorDash. Oracle's rise was attributed to its AI infrastructure power generation deal, while DoorDash benefited from its advancements in autonomous delivery technology. Technology stocks constituted nearly half of the fund's holdings and were key contributors to its overall robust performance.

feed.title: Why You Should Not Worry About Eli Lilly (LLY) and Company’s Foundayo Treatment Prospects
feed.summary: BMO Capital reiterated an Outperform rating and $1,300 price target for Eli Lilly (LLY), expressing confidence that the post-marketing study requirements for its Foundayo treatment are manageable. Despite the FDA's requirement for studies on potential side effects, BMO believes these studies pose no significant risk to Eli Lilly's program or the drug's competitive edge. Foundayo's manufacturing advantage as a small-molecule drug is expected to be a significant asset in the competitive oral obesity market.

feed.title: Ford Recalling 140K Rangers Due to Wiring Issue that Could Cause a Fire
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. is recalling 140,201 Ranger midsize pickups from the 2024 to 2026 model years due to a wiring issue in the A-pillar that could cause an electrical short and potentially lead to a fire. The problem involves sunvisor or headliner wiring harnesses, and owners might notice flickering lights in the sunvisor mirror as a precursor. Ford will notify owners by April 27, and dealers will repair the issue at no cost, with the company currently unaware of any related accidents, injuries, or deaths.

feed.title: DVN Stock Price Prediction 2025-2026 | Devon Energy Corporation Forecast | 24/7 Wall St.
feed.summary: 24/7 Wall St. has issued a "HOLD" rating for Devon Energy Corporation (DVN), setting a 12-month target price of $49.13, indicating a 4.26% upside from its current price of $47.12. The analysis includes an optimistic scenario of $56.01 and a conservative scenario of $42.21, with long-term projections extending to 2031 and a 2030 average price target of $56.54. Analyst sentiment is predominantly bullish, with 21 "Buy" and 6 "Hold" ratings from 27 analysts.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America tops profit estimates as box demand improves (PKG:NYSE)
feed.summary: Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) exceeded profit expectations for the recent quarter, driven by stronger demand and an improved product mix, particularly in corrugated shipments. Although revenue slightly missed analyst targets, the company's shares rose in extended trading. PKG anticipates continued strong demand and higher product prices for the upcoming quarter, contributing to improved adjusted earnings.

feed.title: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) Announces Earnings Results
feed.summary: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) reported Q1 earnings of $2.40 per share, surpassing analyst estimates of $2.17. Despite the beat, shares dipped 2.9% to $204.48, and the company announced a quarterly dividend of $1.25 per share. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $229.00.

feed.title: Microchip Technology jumps as semiconductor rally extends amid AI optimism and earnings-season positioning
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) stock rose 7.4% due to a broad semiconductor rally driven by AI optimism and positioning ahead of tech earnings. The increase reflects market sentiment on AI-driven demand and improved macro expectations, rather than a specific company-focused announcement. Insider selling and institutional investment shifts are also noted, alongside recent analyst ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Neptune Insurance Posts Strong Q1 Growth, Approves Buyback
feed.summary: Neptune Insurance Holdings Inc. (NP) reported robust Q1 2026 growth, with revenue up 29% and written premium rising 26%, despite a drop in net income. The company's board also approved a $100 million stock repurchase program, emphasizing confidence in its financial health and potential for shareholder value. An analyst has a Buy rating on NP stock with a $30.00 price target.

feed.title: HII's Distributed Shipbuilding: Sourcing from 25 Facilities Across 11 States - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) is adopting a distributed shipbuilding model to address U.S. Navy production delays, sourcing components from 25 facilities in 11 states, supporting 1,000 jobs. This strategy aims to boost production by overcoming labor and physical capacity limitations at their main shipyards. HII is outsourcing structural production and expanding internal capacity, with key partners manufacturing components for various naval vessels.

feed.title: Tim Cook Regrets Maps Flub, Sees Apple Watch as His Proudest Work
feed.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook recently stated that the 2012 launch of Apple Maps was his "first really big mistake" as the company's leader due to its significant issues with directions and accuracy. Despite this, he considers the Apple Watch to be his proudest achievement during his tenure. Cook plans to step down from his role in a few months.

feed.title: Broadcom just became the sixth company in U.S. history to achieve this feat
feed.summary: Broadcom's market capitalization has surpassed $2 trillion, making it the sixth U.S. company to reach this milestone. This achievement follows a strong day for chip stocks and Google's announcement of new TPUs. The other companies to have achieved this feat are Nvidia, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Apple.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) Director Sells $254,280.00 in Stock
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) Director James Thompson sold 1,000 shares of company stock for $254,280 on April 21st, reducing his stake by 4.86%. This sale follows the company's strong first-quarter earnings, where it surpassed analyst EPS and revenue estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend. Despite the insider sale, JBHT maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with shares trading near a 52-week high.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) COO Nicholas Hobbs Sells 1,272 Shares
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services COO Nicholas Hobbs sold 1,272 shares of the company's stock for $318,954, reducing his position by 1.37%. The sale occurred after the company reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend. Analysts currently rate J.B. Hunt as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $227.04.
